hero.title: Your Gaming Platform, On Boot.
hero.subtitle: Boot into your configured platform, switch anytime via "Library" in Game Bar — Steam, Xbox, Epic, Armoury Crate SE, or Playnite.
hero.screenshotAlt1: OmniConsole Settings card grid showing installed gaming platforms
hero.screenshotAlt2: OmniCharm Game Bar widget with Mouse Mode and Steam Overlay toggles

what.title: What is OmniConsole?
what.body: OmniConsole runs as the Windows 11 Full Screen Experience (FSE) Home shell on your PC or handheld (ROG Xbox Ally, etc.). Whenever FSE activates, it launches your configured gaming platform automatically. Any platform can be your FSE Home — Steam, Xbox, Epic, Armoury Crate SE, Playnite, or anything you add.

entries.title: Boot
entries.body: Auto-launch into your configured platform (requires "Enter full screen experience on startup" enabled).

entries.title: Xbox Button
entries.body: Opens Game Bar — pick "Home" to launch the platform, or "Library" to open OmniConsole settings.

entries.title: Start Menu
entries.body: Launch OmniConsole from the desktop; FSE is triggered automatically before the platform starts.

what.resultOutFse: Trigger FSE dialog → Re-launch in FSE → Launch configured platform

gamepadHighlights.sectionSubtitle: Stay on the controller — reach Steam menus and navigate desktop apps.

shortcuts.title: Gamepad Steam Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Press ⧉ or long-press ☰ to open Steam menus and the In-Game Overlay directly from your controller.
shortcuts.imageAlt: Xbox controller diagram showing View (⧉) and Menu (☰) button shortcuts for Steam
shortcuts.footnote: ¹ In Steam Big Picture　² In-game　³ Toggleable via the OmniCharm Game Bar widget

mouseMode.title: Gamepad Mouse Mode
mouseMode.description: Turn your controller into a mouse and keyboard. Two layouts — OmniNav or Classic. OmniNav shown below.
mouseMode.imageAlt: Xbox controller with the left stick moving a cursor on a laptop and the A button highlighted as click
mouseMode.footnote: Three states: Off · Auto (Edge, Chrome, Firefox, Opera, Brave, Epic Games Store, File Explorer, Steam) · Force On. Auto-disabled on ROG Ally family.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to make your gaming PC feel like a console.

prerequisites.title: Prerequisites
prerequisites.subtitle: Before installing OmniConsole, enable Windows 11 Full Screen Experience.

desktop.title: Desktops / Laptops / Tablets / Non-native Handhelds
desktop.body: Use Xbox Full Screen Experience Tool to enable FSE first.

native.title: Native FSE Handheld Devices
native.body: Devices like the ROG Xbox Ally series support FSE out of the box. Install OmniConsole directly.

controller.title: Xbox Controller Required
controller.body: Game Bar, FSE, and gamepad features all require an Xbox-compatible (XInput) controller with an Xbox button.

quickStart.title: Quick Start
quickStart.subtitle: Four steps to turn your PC into a gaming console.

step1.title: Install OmniConsole
step1.body: Download the latest release and run Install.bat, or manually install the .cer certificate and both .msix packages.

step2.title: Configure Your Default Platform
step2.body: Open OmniConsole Settings, pick Steam Big Picture / Xbox / Epic / Armoury Crate SE / Playnite, or add a custom one.

step3.title: Set as FSE Home App
step3.body: Windows Settings → Gaming → Full Screen Experience → Choose home app → OmniConsole. Enable "Enter full screen experience on startup".

step4.title: Done
step4.body: Reboot, press the Xbox button and pick "Home", or launch from the Start Menu — your platform opens automatically.

download.title: Download OmniConsole
download.subtitle: Latest stable release from GitHub.
includesList: Dependencies\ — framework packages (VCLibs, Windows App Runtime) for fresh/offline systems
OmniConsoleInstaller.ps1 — PowerShell script invoked by Install.bat
